rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks into the target implementation scope only when bindings depend on implementation-level details.
Place component-type-level contracts in the component type scope; use implementation scope for assignments tied to subcomponent connections.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL structure by ensuring AGREE annexes are scoped to the correct component or implementation level.
Do not reference AADL properties as AGREE variables unless explicitly exposed as typed ports or constants.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **};
Use eq declarations to define boolean range checks, not direct comparisons in guarantees.
anti_patterns: Avoid placing subcomponent port references in component type annexes.
Do not embed AADL property names (e.g., Period, Deadline) as AGREE identifiers.
